message:
refactor: merge rename file/directory branches, use fail("") consistently

- fs-engine rename: unified file/directory paths into single loop (-15 lines)
  The directory branch already handles single files correctly since the
  SQL query includes the entry itself alongside children
- process-manager: replace manual { exitCode: 1, stdout: "", stderr: "" }
  with fail("") in false, test, grep builtins for consistency
